title: Elytra Eraser
description: Replace those pesky Elytra's with a useless leather chestplate!
body:
Do you _**absolutly hate**_ Elytra's on your server? Elytra Eraser is here to help. This data pack brings an essential balance change making Elytra's useless. Erasing Elytra's creates a more enjoyable experience for everyone, as they allow players to use different modes of transportation rather than the elytra. Additionally, this makes The End a more challenging place to navigate for experienced players. ## Key Features * **Erasing Elytra's:** All naturally spawning Elytra's get replaced with an unbreakable leather chestplate so you can still flex to your friends. * **Admin Workarounds:** This data pack doesn't *directly* remove Elytra's, just prevents Elytra's from being placed inside item frames, as they naturally spawn. So if you still wanted an Elytra, you could still use `/give` or get one from the Creative Menu.
### Example of an Elytra being replaced: ![Example of an Elytra being replaced](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/D18Z3b4T/images/3a22589a91a1e70cf278681627aaa5dee08c9324_350.webp)
## Find a Bug? If you encounter any issues or have suggestions for improvements, please submit them using the "Report issues" tab on the right of this page. ## Like this Project? If you're feeling generous and want to support my work, you can [buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/burnttoastdev). Thank you! 🧡
